message:
feat(keyboard): integrate keyboard shortcuts system into app shell

Integrates the keyboard shortcuts hook into the main Providers component
and connects it with SpotlightSearch and a new shortcuts help modal.

Providers.tsx:
- Add keyboard shortcuts registration at app root level
- Define comprehensive shortcuts for navigation and actions
- Connect Cmd+K to open SpotlightSearch
- Connect ? or Cmd+/ to open shortcuts help modal
- Add navigation shortcuts (G then H/L/S for Home/Library/Swap Meet)
- Add Escape to close modals globally
- Add Cmd+N for new prompt creation

useKeyboardShortcuts.ts:
- Improve hook stability and performance
- Better handling of modifier keys (cmd/ctrl, shift, alt)
- Prevent shortcuts in input fields by default
- Support for sequence shortcuts (e.g., "g h")

SpotlightSearch.tsx:
- Listen for jfp:open-spotlight custom event
- Allow programmatic opening from keyboard shortcuts
- Maintain backward compatibility with direct key listeners

This enables power users to navigate the entire app without mouse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
